title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Lucknow office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
